MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's motion for compromise of claim of Minor, Christpher Aguilar Castro.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Court Reporter: Janet Pond; CSR #5292; 415-710-6481; pond.janet@gmail.com

Stephen appearing for Claimant Christpher Aguilar Castro
Guardian ad Litem Yenifer Aguilar appearing represented by Joseph Lee, Esq., is placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Mark Zhang not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents brief recitation of case.
Guardian ad Litem is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.
The Court finds the settlement is reasonable and the Guardian ad Litem confirms it is in the best interest of the Claimant.

The court hereby APPROVES Plaintiff's Motion for Compromise of Claim for the settlement amount of $215,000.00 minus the following:

1. $54,514.68 for Attorney's Fees
2. $49,804.01 for Costs

Balance of settlement in the sum of $110,681.31 shall be disbursed as follows:

1. $27,670.33 for Payment to Dilia Castro (Claimant's Mother) for share of proceeds.
2. $27,670.33 for Payment to Yenifir Fernando Aguilar (Claimant's Father)for share of proceeds.
3. $20,000.00 for Payment to Filia Castro (Claimant's Mother) to be spent for Claimant's speech therapy.
4. $35,340.66 shall be deposited in a blocked account at Bank of America located at 2701 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94110.

The Plaintiff is authorized and directed to execute all documents reasonably necessary to carry out the terms of the settlement.

Proposed Orders Approving Compromise of Claim or Action or Disposition of Proceeds of Judgment for Minor or Person with a Disability and to Deposit Funds in Blocked Account are signed and filed this date.

Court orders matter continued to June 16, 2023, at 1:30 p.m. in Department 505 for progress report on the deposit of funds in a blocked account. (D505)
